evidence: Verified exact leaves remain limited to 3 reviewed ROE-owned pages; this does not truthfully prove district-grade routing statewide.

Reviewed PTI evidence currently points to https://www.fmptic.org, which is documented as serving downstate Illinois, while https://frcd.org now states that Family Matters PTIC became the official PTIC for Illinois as of October 1, 2025. The packet still lacks reviewed statewide proof for the designated PTI family.
